geographic_restrictions: Pennsylvania (focus on Great Lakes region, particularly Lake Erie and its tributaries)
project_area: Water quality and watershed-related initiatives, including commitments under the Great Lakes Water Quality Agreement and the Great Lakes-St. Lawrence River Basin Water Resources Compact and Agreement
eligibility_summary: The Great Lakes Program coordinates and implements water quality and watershed initiatives in Pennsylvania, focusing on Lake Erie and its tributaries. It collaborates with state, county, and local governments, Canadian provinces, U.S. and Canadian federal agencies, and non-governmental organizations to reduce pollutants and support public health. Eligibility is not explicitly restricted to specific applicant types, but participation typically involves government entities, NGOs, and academic institutions.
